items.name: Abbest Wind
items.description: Does low single target damage. Plays a second turn. Agile mask: costs 0 AP
items.enemy_location: Many places, an easy one is east of the Forgotten Battlefield, near the Boat Graveyard

items.name: Aberration Light
items.description: Deals high Light damage to all enemies. 2 hits. Applies 4 Burn per hit. Agile Mask: Applies 2 more Burn per hit.
items.enemy_location: Renoir's Drafts (requires Esquie Dive to enter) near Visages

items.name: Ballet Charm
items.description: Deals low single target Light damage. 1 hit. Applies Powerless to the target for 3 turns. Caster Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Siréne

items.name: Benisseur Mortar
items.description: Deals medium single target Ice damage. 3 hits. Change to Almighty Mask if target is Marked. Caster Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Siréne, The Chosen Path, Renoir's Drafts, Overworld on the east of Esquie's nest, across the water (Requires Fly)

items.name: Bouchelier Fortify
items.description: Applies Shell to 1-3 allies for 3 turns. Heavy Mask: Also applies 1 Shield.
items.enemy_location: Visages, Renoir's Drafts, Overworld northeast of Frozen Hearts across the water

items.name: Braseleur Smash
items.description: Deals medium single target Fire damage and applies 3 Burn. 2 hits. Balanced Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Frozen Hearts, Overworld west of Gestral beach (west of Monoco's Station)

items.name: Bruler Bash
items.description: Deals medium single target Physical damage. 3 hits. Can Break. Caster Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Flying Waters, The Monolith, many Overworld places such as next to the Gestral Beach northeast of the Stone Wave Cliffs

items.name: Chalier Combo
items.description: Deals high single target Physical damage. 6 hits. Interrupted if failed. Balanced Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Available from the start

items.name: Chapelier Slash
items.description: Deals high Physical damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Applies Mark. Agile Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Visages, Overworld on the east of Esquie's nest, across the water (Requires Fly)

items.name: Chevaliere Ice
items.description: Deals high Ice damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Applies Slow to the targets for 3 turns. Balanced Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Old Lumière

items.name: Chevaliere Piercing
items.description: Deals single target Physical damage through Shields. 6 hits. Damage increased for each Shield on the target. Agile Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Old Lumière

items.name: Chevaliere Thrusts
items.description: Deals high Physical damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Critical Hits deal double damage. Heavy Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Old Lumière

items.name: Clair Enfeeble
items.description: Deals medium Light damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Applies Powerless for 3 turns. Balanced Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: The Monolith or alongside the Tainted Cliffs Mime

items.name: Contorsionniste Blast
items.description: Deals medium Physical damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Heals all allies by 10% Health for each enemy hit. Balanced Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Visages or Act III Lumière

items.name: Creation Void
items.description: Deals extreme Void damage to random targets. 3 hits. More damage if the same target is hit multiple times. Caster Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Miniboss in Renoir's Drafts (requires Esquie Dive to enter)

items.name: Cruler Barrier
items.description: Applies 1-2 Shields to the target. Heavy Mask: Gives 2 AP to the target.
items.enemy_location: Overworld, south of Monoco's Station

items.name: Cultist Blood
items.description: Deals medium Dark damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Sacrifices 90% Health to increase damage. Heavy Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Overworld, northwest of Monoco's Station

items.name: Cultists Slashes
items.description: Deals medium single target Dark damage. 3 hits. Deals more damage the less Health Monoco has. Agile Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Overworld, northwest of Monoco's Station

items.name: Danseusse Waltz
items.description: Deals high single target Fire damage. 3 hits. Deals more damage against Burning targets. Balanced Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Frozen Hearts

items.name: Demineur Thunder
items.description: Deals low single target Lightning damage. 1 hit. Deals extra Break damage. Caster Mask: Increased Break damage.
items.enemy_location: Overworld, south of Monoco's Station

items.name: Duallist Storm
items.description: Deals extreme single target Physical damage. 4 hits. Can Break. Almighty Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Endless Tower (stage 11-1) or in Flying Manor

items.name: Echassier Stabs
items.description: Deals medium single target Physical damage. 2 hits. Second hit applies Mark to the target. Agile Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: The Reacher, Renoir's Drafts, Overworld south of Frozen Hearts (requires Fly)

items.name: Eveque Spear
items.description: Deals high single target Earth damage and applies Powerless for 3 turns. 1 hit. Heavy Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: The Monolith, Endless Tower stage 9-1

items.name: Gault Fury
items.description: Deals low single target Physical damage. 4 hits. Applies Mark. Balanced Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Overworld, south of Monoco's Station

items.name: Glaise Earthquakes
items.description: Deals medium Earth damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Applies Powerful to self. Heavy Mask: Applies Powerful to all allies.
items.enemy_location: Yellow Harvest (boss), Falling Leaves, Overworld south of Frozen Hearts (requires Fly)

items.name: Grosse Tete Whack
items.description: Deals high single target Physical damage. 5 hits. Applies Defenceless for 3 turns. Heavy Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: The Continent in front of Coastal Cave (missable) The Flying Manor (can respawn)

items.name: Hexga Crush
items.description: Deals medium single target Earth damage. 2 hits. Applies Defenceless to the target for 3 turns. Heavy Mask: Increases Defenceless duration to 5 turns.
items.enemy_location: Stone wave Cliffs, many Overworld places such as next to the Gestral Beach northeast of the Stone Wave Cliffs

items.name: Jar Lampstorm
items.description: Deals medium Physical damage to all enemies. 4 hits. Heavy Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Overworld, south of Monoco's Station

items.name: Lampmaster Light
items.description: Deals high Light damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Increased damage at each cast. Almighty Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Flying Manor (miniboss) or Endless tower stage 11-2

items.name: Lancelier Impale
items.description: Deals low single target Ice damage. 1 hit. Slows the target for 3 turns. Agile Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Spring Meadows, The Monolith, Overworld, north of Spring Meadows

items.name: Luster Slices
items.description: Deals low single target Physical damage. 3 hits. Applies Rush to self for 3 turns. Agile Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Flying Waters, Overworld inbetween Flying Waters and Gestral Village

items.name: Moissonneusse Vendage
items.description: Deals High single target Physical damage. 3 hits. Can Break. Balanced Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Visages, Lumière (act III), Renoir's Drafts, Overworld on a beach directly west from Monoco's station near the edge of the map

items.name: Obscur Sword
items.description: Deals high single target Dark damage. 5 hits. Deals more damage against Powerless targets. Heavy Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: The Monolith, Crimson Forest

items.name: Orphelin Cheers
items.description: Applies Powerful to 1-3 allies. Caster Mask: Also gives 3 AP to targets.
items.enemy_location: Lumière (act III), Renoir's Drafts, The Reacher

items.name: Perelin Heal
items.description: Applies Regen to all allies. Caster Mask: Also Heals 40% Health.
items.enemy_location: Overworld, northwest of Monoco's Station

items.name: Portier Crash
items.description: Deals high Physical damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Can Break. Heavy Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Overworld, inbetween Esoteric Ruins and Gestral Beach, west of Monoco's Station

items.name: Potier Energy
items.description: Gives 1-3 AP to all allies. Caster Mask: Gives 1 additional AP.
items.enemy_location: Overworld east of the Forgotten Battlefield, near the Boat Graveyard

items.name: Ramasseur Bonk
items.description: Deals low single target Dark damage. 1 hit. Can Break. Agile Mask: Fills 20% of the target's Break Bar.
items.enemy_location: Forgotten Battlefield, The Monolith, Overworld, South of the Caroussel

items.name: Rocher Hammering
items.description: Deals medium single target Physical damage. 4 hits. Can Break. Heavy Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Stone wave Cliffs, many Overworld places such as a beach north of the Floating Cemetery, west of Monoco's Station

items.name: Sakapatate Estoc
items.description: Deals low single target Lightning damage. 1 hit. Deals more damage if the target is Stunned. Balanced Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Ancient Sanctuary in front of Gestral Village, The Monolith

items.name: Sakapatate Explosion
items.description: Deals medium Lightning damage to random enemies. 3 hits. Critical Hits trigger an additional hit. Caster Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Ancient Sanctuary in front of Gestral Village, The Monolith

items.name: Sakapatate Fire
items.description: Deals extreme Fire damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Apply 3 Burn per hit. Almighty Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: The Monolith, Endless tower stage 7-3

items.name: Sakapatate Slam
items.description: Deals high Physical damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Increased damage to Marked targets. Heavy Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Ancient Sanctuary in front of Gestral Village, The Monolith

items.name: Sapling Absorption
items.description: Deals high Dark damage. 3 hits. Recovers 5% Health on hit. Caster Mask: Increased damage and double Heal
items.enemy_location: Falling Leaves, many Overworld places such as a beach north of the Floating Cemetery, west of Monoco's Station

items.name: Stalact Punches
items.description: Deals medium single target Ice damage. 4 hits. High Break damage. Heavy Mask: Increased damage.
items.enemy_location: Available from the start

items.name: Troubadour Trumpet
items.description: Applies a random buff to 1-3 allies. Caster Mask: Applies a second random buff.
items.enemy_location: Overworld, south of Monoco's Station
